description: Main React application component for a student dashboard platform, managing state, UI rendering, and importing various subcomponents and utilities.

classes.name: App
classes.description: Main React component implementing the student dashboard interface, handling state, user interactions, data filtering, and rendering various dashboard sections.

classes.name: ProfilePanel
classes.description: Component displaying student's profile summary information and academic metrics.

classes.name: ClassesPanel
classes.description: Component listing current classes with details such as instructor, schedule, and location.

classes.name: AssignmentsPanel
classes.description: Component showing assignments with deadlines, status, and points, with ability to toggle status.

classes.name: GradesPanel
classes.description: Component displaying recent grades, calculating grade averages, and visualizing score percentages.

classes.name: CalendarPanel
classes.description: Component presenting calendar events in a week view and upcoming events in a list.

classes.name: NotificationsPanel
classes.description: Component listing notifications with options to mark as read/unread.

methods.name: App()
methods.description: Main React functional component, manages overall dashboard state and UI logic.

methods.name: ProfilePanel({ profile })
methods.description: Displays profile snapshot and summary details.

methods.name: ClassesPanel({ classes })
methods.description: Render list of classes with their information.

methods.name: GradesPanel({ grades, classesById })
methods.description: Displays recent grade items, computes average percentage.

methods.name: CalendarPanel({ events, classesById })
methods.description: Shows weekly calendar and upcoming events.

methods.name: NotificationsPanel({ notifications, onMarkRead })
methods.description: Lists notifications, enables marking as read/unread.

methods.name: markNotificationRead
methods.description: Marks a notification as read/unread (updates state).

methods.name: toggleAssignmentStatus
methods.description: Toggles assignment status among predefined states.

methods.name: resetToMockData
methods.description: Resets dashboard data to default mock data and clears stored state.
